hooks.command:
cd /home/user/Consult6 && git fetch origin rebrand-work && git checkout rebrand-work && git pull origin rebrand-work && printf '#!/bin/sh
while read l ls r rs; do
  case "$r" in refs/heads/main) echo "ERROR: push to main is blocked — use rebrand-work"; exit 1;; esac
done
exit 0
' > .git/hooks/pre-push && chmod +x .git/hooks/pre-push
